title: MTR Taipei Metro Expansion Pack
description: Remade (Taiwan) Taipei Metro trains and sounds in Minecraft.
body:
# **Taiwan MRT - Taipei Metro Expansion pack - By HMT Railway Studio**

## **Mod Require**
- [MTR Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/minecraft-transit-railway) is must to download.
**Version must be 3.2.2 or below.**

## **Packs Included**
- Heavy-Rail Train: Taipei Metro Class 301, 321, 341, 371, and 381
(Trains' sounds are all **authorised** and come from YihGe ([RTMworldFactory](https://sites.google.com/view/rtmworldfactory)) )
- Arrival & Departure Music
- Taipei Metro Platform Doors (apg only)
- Taipei Metro Destinations PIDS
- Changing Vanilla concrete color (brown, blue, red, orange, and yellow) to the color in real life
